---
title: "About Me"
---

<style>

.about-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding-top: 40px;
  padding-bottom: 60px;
}

.about-photo {
  width: 240px;
  height: 240px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 6px solid #444;
  margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.about-title {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #ffffff;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.about-subtitle {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: #ddd;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.about-text {
  max-width: 700px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #eee;
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.skills-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 15px;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.skills-list span {
  background: #555;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #fff;
}

.social-links a {
  margin: 0 10px;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.social-links a:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
</style>

<div class="about-container">

<img class="about-photo"
     src="images/bali.jpg"
     alt="Caito Oreilly Portrait">

<div class="about-title">Hi, I’m Caito!</div>
<div class="about-subtitle">Frontend Developer • Designer • Creative Storyteller</div>

<div class="about-text">
I’m a developer who loves building beautiful and functional experiences online. I work mainly with
Quarto for documentation and portfolio sites, and I enjoy crafting modern, responsive designs with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
When I’m not coding, you’ll find me exploring new tech, creating art, or sharing projects with the community.
</div>

<div class="skills-list">
  <span>HTML</span>
  <span>CSS</span>
  <span>JavaScript</span>
  <span>Quarto</span>
  <span>Responsive Design</span>
  <span>Bootstrap</span>
</div>

<div class="social-links" style="margin-top: 30px;">
  <a href="https://github.com/cait-oreilly" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
  <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

</div>
